# Jain Tours & Travels

> Mumbai-based travel agency (est. 2008) curating premium, fully-customised domestic and international holiday packages. 4.9★ on Google with 142+ verified reviews. IATA-aware operator serving leisure, honeymoon, family, group, pilgrimage, and corporate travellers across India.

## Company facts

- Legal name: Jain Tours & Travels
- Founded: 2008
- Headquarters: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
- Office: Shop No 06, 1st Floor, Vinay Kumkum Shopping Arcade, above Canara Bank, Kakaji Nagar, Jawahar Nagar, Goregaon West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400104, India
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 98212 35678
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 11:00–19:00 IST (closed Sunday)
- Website: https://jaintoursonline.com
- Service area: All of India (booking origin); destinations across India and 30+ countries worldwide
- Languages: English, Hindi, Marathi, Gujarati

## Pages

- [Home](https://jaintoursonline.com/): Curated luxury journeys from Mumbai.
- [Destinations](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations): Domestic and international holiday destinations.
- [Services](https://jaintoursonline.com/services): Flights, visas, cruises, insurance, and corporate travel.
- [Reviews](https://jaintoursonline.com/reviews): Guest reviews and testimonials.
- [About](https://jaintoursonline.com/about): Our story, philosophy, and team.
- [Contact](https://jaintoursonline.com/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, email, and Mumbai office address.

## Featured destinations (India)

- [Kerala](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/kerala): Backwaters, houseboats, and tea estates.
- [Kashmir](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/kashmir): Dal Lake houseboats and Gulmarg snow.
- [Rajasthan](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/rajasthan): Forts, palaces, and desert camps.
- [Goa](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/goa): Beaches, nightlife, Portuguese heritage.
- [Himachal](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/himachal): Shimla, Manali, Spiti.
- [Leh–Ladakh](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/leh-ladakh): High-altitude monasteries and lakes.
- [Uttarakhand](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/uttarakhand): Hills, wildlife, Char Dham.
- [North East](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/north-east): Meghalaya, Assam, Arunachal.
- [Andaman](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/andaman): Beaches, scuba diving, island hopping.
- [Char Dham](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/char-dham): Pilgrimage circuit in Uttarakhand.

## Featured destinations (International)

- [Maldives](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/maldives): Overwater villas and reef snorkelling.
- [Dubai](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/dubai): City breaks, desert safaris, luxury stays.
- [Europe](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/europe): Multi-country curated itineraries.
- [Thailand](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/thailand): Phuket, Krabi, Bangkok, Pattaya.
- [Bali](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/bali): Ubud, Seminyak, Nusa islands.
- [Vietnam](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/vietnam): Hanoi, Halong Bay, Da Nang, Ho Chi Minh.
- [Singapore & Malaysia](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/singapore-malaysia): Twin-city Southeast Asia combo.
- [Bhutan](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/bhutan): Paro, Thimphu, Punakha monasteries.
- [Sri Lanka](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/sri-lanka): Cultural triangle and beaches.
- [Nepal](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/nepal): Kathmandu, Pokhara, Himalayan trekking.
- [Japan](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/japan): Tokyo, Kyoto, Osaka, Mt Fuji.
- [Georgia](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/georgia): Tbilisi, Baku, Gabala.
- [United Kingdom](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/united-kingdom): London, Scotland highlands.
- [Australia](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/australia): Sydney, Melbourne, Gold Coast.
- [Mauritius](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/mauritius): Beaches and island excursions.
- [Hong Kong](https://jaintoursonline.com/destinations/hongkong): City, Disneyland, Macau.

## Services offered

- Customised holiday package design (domestic & international)
- Honeymoon and family vacation planning
- Group tours and pilgrimage tours (Char Dham, Vaishno Devi, Tirupati)
- Corporate / MICE travel
- International & domestic flight bookings
- Hotel and resort reservations
- Visa assistance and documentation
- Travel insurance
- Cruise bookings
- Airport transfers and chauffeured car rentals
- Foreign exchange guidance

## How to enquire

- Call or WhatsApp +91 98212 35678
- Submit the enquiry form at https://jaintoursonline.com/contact
- Visit the Mumbai office (Goregaon West), Mon–Sat 11:00–19:00 IST
- Typical response time: under 4 business hours

- [Full LLM context](https://jaintoursonline.com/llms-full.txt): Extended factual reference for AI search engines.

## Travel blog

- [Best Time to Visit Kashmir: A Month-by-Month Guide (2026)](https://jaintoursonline.com/blog/best-time-to-visit-kashmir): From tulip blooms in April to snow-covered Gulmarg in January — how to time your Kashmir trip perfectly.
- [Maldives Honeymoon from India: Real Costs, Top Resorts & 7-Day Plan](https://jaintoursonline.com/blog/maldives-honeymoon-from-india-cost-guide): A transparent breakdown of what a Maldives honeymoon actually costs from Mumbai, with resort tiers and a tested 7-day itinerary.
- [Dubai vs Singapore: Which is the Better Family Holiday from India?](https://jaintoursonline.com/blog/dubai-vs-singapore-family-holiday): Cost, kid-friendliness, food, attractions and visa — a side-by-side comparison for Indian families.
- [Bali in 7 Days: A First-Timer's Itinerary from Mumbai](https://jaintoursonline.com/blog/bali-7-day-itinerary-from-mumbai): A balanced Ubud + Seminyak + Nusa Penida itinerary tested across hundreds of our travellers.
- [Char Dham Yatra by Helicopter: Complete 2026 Booking Guide](https://jaintoursonline.com/blog/char-dham-yatra-by-helicopter-2026): How the helicopter yatra works, what it costs, which package to pick and when to book.
- [Vietnam in 8 Days: Hanoi, Halong Bay & Da Nang Itinerary](https://jaintoursonline.com/blog/vietnam-8-days-itinerary): The three-region Vietnam itinerary we have refined over hundreds of trips — what to see and what to skip.
- [Schengen Visa from India in 2026: Documents, Timeline & Approval Tips](https://jaintoursonline.com/blog/schengen-visa-from-india-guide): Which country to apply through, common rejection reasons, and how to maximise your approval odds.
- [Europe in 10 Days: Best 3-Country Combinations for Indian Travellers](https://jaintoursonline.com/blog/europe-10-days-best-combinations): Five Europe combos tested with hundreds of our travellers — pick the one that matches your style.
- [Andaman vs Maldives: An Honest Comparison for Indian Couples](https://jaintoursonline.com/blog/andaman-vs-maldives-comparison): Beach quality, food, cost, romance and adventure — which one is actually right for your honeymoon?
- [Leh-Ladakh Bike Trip: A First-Timer's Complete Guide](https://jaintoursonline.com/blog/leh-ladakh-bike-trip-guide): Routes, costs, acclimatisation, permits and bike choice — everything to plan a safe Leh-Ladakh bike trip.
